meta_title: For Freelancers: design with AI to Solve no marketing skills (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome no marketing skills. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Design with AI: Freelancer's Guide to Solving Marketing Gaps
content.seo_description: Bridge your marketing gap as a freelancer. Learn to design with AI using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship high-conversion assets rapidly and professionally.
content.answer_block: Stop chasing design perfection. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid UI generation and Claude Code for automated iteration, you transform your technical output into high-converting marketing assets. This workflow allows you to ship professional, design-forward products without needing a dedicated marketing team or expensive agency tools.
content.intro:
You are a master of logic, a wizard of the terminal, yet your perfectly engineered SaaS sits in the shadows, unmarketed and unseen. The 'marketing gap' is the silent killer of freelance careers—it’s the chasm between a functional product and a profitable business. You have the code, but you lack the visual language that commands attention.

Relief has arrived. We are shifting the paradigm from 'coding only' to 'designing with AI.' By integrating Antigravity’s rapid prototyping with the sheer velocity of Claude Code, you can automate the creation of high-conversion landing pages and visual assets that look like they came from a boutique design firm, all while staying within your IDE.

steps.title: Analyze Competitor Visual Language
steps.description: Before building, use AI to reverse-engineer the design patterns of successful competitors in your niche.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze these 3 URLs. Extract their color palette, typography hierarchy, and UI component spacing. Generate a design system token file in JSON.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --file design_tokens.json 'Generate a Tailwind config based on these tokens'

steps.title: Rapid UI Component Generation
steps.description: Generate high-fidelity UI components that align with your brand identity using Antigravity's generative engine.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a high-conversion Hero section for a SaaS landing page using the generated tokens. Include a clear value prop area and a primary CTA button.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Create a React component for the Hero section using the provided design tokens'

steps.title: Automate Copy-to-Design Mapping
steps.description: Ensure your marketing copy dictates the design structure, not the other way around.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Map the following value propositions to specific UI cards. Ensure the layout optimizes for readability and emotional impact.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'Refactor the FeatureGrid component to display these 4 value props with icons'

steps.title: Responsive Optimization via AI
steps.description: Force the AI to audit your design for responsiveness across all breakpoints, ensuring mobile conversion.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit this component code for mobile responsiveness. Apply fluid typography and stack-based layout logic.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Check for mobile responsiveness and add media queries to ensure 100% score on Lighthouse'

steps.title: Final Visual Polish
steps.description: Apply high-end design flourishes like gradients, glassmorphism, and micro-interactions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Apply modern UI trends including backdrop-blur, subtle gradients, and hover transitions to the current landing page build.
steps.claude_code_command: claude commit 'Add professional UI polish and animations to the landing page'

pro_tips: Always define a 'Negative Constraint' in your prompts to prevent the AI from adding unnecessary visual clutter.
Use Claude Code to create a 'watch' script that automatically updates your design tokens whenever your CSS changes.
Never ship a design without running a 'Contrast Accessibility Audit' prompt to ensure your marketing assets are inclusive.
Store your best-performing AI prompts in a local 'Prompt Library' folder within your project to ensure design consistency across multiple client apps.
Use AI to generate 'A/B Test Variants' of your hero section by asking it to pivot the tone from 'technical' to 'benefit-driven'.
content.next_steps: Once your landing page is live, use Claude Code to scrape your own site's performance data and feed it back into the AI to iterate on your next conversion-focused design update.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical edge to out-design and out-market your competition. Stop waiting for a designer to save your project. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
